sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO sys_department_t (departname,departtype,parentid,lingwuid,validflag,updateoperator,updatetime,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ('$departname$',$departtype$,$parentid$,'$lingwuid$',1,'$updateoperator$','$updatetime$','$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE sys_department_t SET validflag = 0 WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE sys_department_t SET departname = '$departname$',memo='$memo$',departtype=$departtype$,parentid=$parentid$,lingwuid='$lingwuid$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(id) FROM sys_department_t WHERE validflag > 0
departtype = $departtype$
(departname like '%$departname$%')

SELECT * FROM sys_department_t WHERE validflag > 0
departtype = $departtype$
(departname like '%$departname$%')
ORDER BY id
SELECT * FROM sys_department_t WHERE validflag > 0 AND id = $id$
SELECT * FROM sys_department_t WHERE validflag > 0 AND parentid = $parentid$

select id,parentid,departname from sys_department_t where validflag>0 UNION select 0-id,departmentid,staffName from sys_user_t where validflag>0
staffName like '%$departname$%'

SELECT departname FROM sys_department_t WHERE validflag > 0
departtype = $departtype$
ORDER BY id
SELECT id as departmentid, departname, departcode, lingwuid FROM sys_department_t_new WHERE id BETWEEN 240 AND 263 AND validflag = 1 ORDER BY id
